name: Kth Element of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Given two sorted arrays arr1 and arr2, and an integer k, find the element that would be at the kth position (1-indexed) of the combined sorted array. Do this in O(log(min(m, n))) time.
constraints: 1 <= arr1.length, arr2.length <= 10^6. 1 <= k <= arr1.length + arr2.length. 0 <= arr1[i], arr2[i] <= 10^6.
